title: Career Orchestrator Worker — Initial Build
principles: Modular: one file per DB table, one file per AI model, per-provider AI handlers, per-task AI helpers
All AI calls go through src/backend/ai/tasks/* — direct env.AI.run() is forbidden outside the AI layer
All Workers AI calls route through AI Gateway (caching + observability)
Schema changes always: pnpm run db:generate, never hand-edit SQL migrations
wrangler.jsonc binding changes always: pnpm run cf-typegen immediately after
Frontend defaults to shadcn dark theme; Navbar + ErrorLogger on every page; never window.alert/prompt/confirm; no mock data
OpenAPI doc routes (/openapi.json, /scalar, /swagger) are dynamic — derived from drizzle-zod schemas, never hardcoded

tasks.title: Install new dependencies
actions: pnpm add @hono/zod-openapi drizzle-zod agents notebooklm-sdk recharts postal-mime zod-to-json-schema
Add scripts to package.json: db:studio, types
acceptance: package.json includes all 7 new deps and 2 new scripts

tasks.title: Update wrangler.jsonc bindings
actions: Add vars: AI_GATEWAY_ID, AI_GATEWAY_ACCOUNT_ID, MODEL_CHAT, MODEL_EXTRACT, MODEL_DRAFT
Add 5 new secrets_store_secrets entries: NOTEBOOKLM_OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN, NOTEBOOKLM_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID, NOTEBOOKLM_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET, NOTEBOOKLM_NOTEBOOK_ID, COOKIE_SIGNING_KEY
acceptance: worker-configuration.d.ts regenerated; Env interface includes BROWSER, EMAIL_OUT, ORCHESTRATOR_AGENT, all new secrets
Note in implementation log: user must populate the 5 new secrets via `wrangler secrets-store secret create` before first deploy

tasks.title: Delete obsolete frontend components and route files
acceptance: All 14 shadcn primitives in src/frontend/components/ui/ remain untouched

tasks.title: Create db/schemas/roles.ts
tasks.spec: PRD §3 — drizzle table + insertRoleSchema + selectRoleSchema + Role/NewRole types

tasks.title: Create db/schemas/documents.ts
tasks.spec: id, gdocId, roleId (FK roles cascade), type ['resume','cover_letter','notes','other'], version, name, createdAt; index on roleId

tasks.title: Create db/schemas/threads.ts
tasks.spec: id, title, roleId (FK roles cascade, nullable), createdAt

tasks.title: Create db/schemas/messages.ts
tasks.spec: id, threadId (FK threads cascade), roleId (FK roles cascade, nullable), author ['user','agent','system'], content, metadata JSON, timestamp; index on threadId

tasks.title: Create db/schemas/emails.ts
tasks.spec: id, roleId (FK roles set null, nullable), subject, body, sender, rawContent, processedStatus ['pending','associated','unmatched','responded','ignored'], receivedAt; index on processedStatus

tasks.title: Create db/schemas/global-config.ts
tasks.spec: key (PK), value (JSON), updatedAt

tasks.title: Create db/schema.ts barrel
tasks.spec: export * from each schemas/* file. No inline definitions.

tasks.title: Create db/index.ts (drizzle factory)
tasks.spec: export function getDb(env: Env) { return drizzle(env.DB) }

tasks.title: Generate single fresh migration
actions: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "select name from sqlite_master where type='table'"
acceptance: drizzle/0000_*.sql exists with CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS  for roles, documents, threads, messages, emails, global_config
Local D1 query returns all 6 tables

tasks.title: Provider base contract
tasks.spec: AIProvider interface with invokeModel + streamModel; ModelDescriptor<TInput, TOutput> generic with id, capabilities, input zod, output zod, serialize, parseResponse; InvokeOpts with cacheTtl, signal

tasks.title: Workers AI provider (gateway-routed)
tasks.spec: Class WorkersAIProvider implements AIProvider. invokeModel: validates input via model.input, calls https://gateway.ai.cloudflare.com/v1/{AI_GATEWAY_ACCOUNT_ID}/{AI_GATEWAY_ID}/workers-ai/{model.id} with Bearer ${AI_GATEWAY_TOKEN.get()} header; passes cf-aig-cache-ttl header from opts.cacheTtl; runs model.parseResponse on result. streamModel: same path, returns ReadableStream. Falls back to env.AI.run for streams the gateway can't proxy.

tasks.title: Provider factory + barrel
tasks.spec: export function getProvider(env: Env, name: 'workers-ai' = 'workers-ai'): AIProvider; switch on name; default workers-ai

tasks.title: Model definition helper
tasks.spec: export function defineModel<TIn, TOut>(spec: { id, capabilities, input: ZodType<TIn>, output: ZodType<TOut>, serialize: (i: TIn) => unknown, parseResponse: (raw: unknown) => TOut }): ModelDescriptor<TIn, TOut>

tasks.title: Model: llama-3.3-70b-instruct-fp8-fast
tasks.spec: Input zod: { messages: ChatMessage[], max_tokens?, temperature?, response_format? }. Output zod: { response: string }. See PRD §5.2.

tasks.title: Model: llama-3.1-8b-instruct
tasks.spec: Same shape as 70b, smaller default token budget (1024)

tasks.title: Model: bge-large-en-v1.5
tasks.spec: Input zod: { text: string[] }. Output zod: { data: number[][] }.

tasks.title: Model: whisper
tasks.spec: Input zod: { audio: number[] | ArrayBuffer }. Output zod: { text: string, words?: Array<{...}> }.

tasks.title: Model: aura-1 (TTS)
tasks.spec: Input zod: { text: string, voice?: string }. Output is ReadableStream — use streamModel only.

tasks.title: Model: llava-1.5-7b-hf (vision)
tasks.spec: Input zod: { image: number[], prompt: string, max_tokens? }. Output zod: { description: string }.

tasks.title: Model registry
tasks.spec: Export modelRegistry mapping task names (chat/extract/draft/embed/stt/tts/vision) to model descriptors. Allow overrides via env.MODEL_CHAT etc.

tasks.title: Task: chat
tasks.spec: chat(env, { messages, cacheTtl? }) → string. Uses modelRegistry.chat.

tasks.title: Task: extract
tasks.spec: extract<T>(env, { text, schema: T, cacheTtl? }) → z.infer<T>. JSON-mode via response_format json_schema. See PRD §5.3.

tasks.title: Task: draft
tasks.spec: draft(env, { docType: 'resume'|'cover_letter'|'email_reply', context }) → string. Uses modelRegistry.draft.

tasks.title: Task: stream-chat
tasks.spec: streamChat(env, { messages }) → ReadableStream<Uint8Array> formatted as SSE.

tasks.title: Task: embed
tasks.spec: embed(env, { texts: string[] }) → number[][]

tasks.title: Add oxlint no-restricted-imports rule
tasks.spec: Forbid imports of src/backend/ai/providers/* and src/backend/ai/models/* from anywhere outside src/backend/ai/. Tasks may import from providers/models. Rest of codebase imports only from tasks/.

tasks.title: lib/crypto.ts — HMAC helpers
tasks.spec: hmacSign(key: string, payload: string): Promise<string> using crypto.subtle HMAC-SHA256, returns base64url. constantTimeEqual(a,b): boolean.

tasks.title: lib/cookies.ts — signed cookie helpers
tasks.spec: createSessionCookie(env, payload): Promise<string> mints cr_session with 2-year exp; verifySessionCookie(env, raw): Promise<payload | null>; clearSessionCookie() returns expiring cookie header.

tasks.title: Auth middleware
tasks.spec: Hono middleware. Skips /api/auth/login. Reads cr_session cookie, verifies via lib/cookies, sets c.set('authed', true) on success. 401 on failure.

tasks.title: Error middleware
tasks.spec: app.onError handler — JSON-formats errors, logs with severity, masks 5xx details in prod.

tasks.title: Auth routes
tasks.spec: OpenAPIHono router. POST /api/auth/login: { apiKey } → constant-time compare with env.WORKER_API_KEY.get(); on success Set-Cookie cr_session. POST /api/auth/logout: clear cookie.

phases.name: AI tools (Browser Rendering, Google Docs, NotebookLM)

tasks.title: Browser Rendering tool
tasks.spec: scrapeUrl(env, url): { html, text, links, screenshotR2Key? }. POST https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/{CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.get()}/browser-rendering/scrape with Bearer CF_BROWSER_RENDER_TOKEN.

tasks.title: Google Service-Account auth helper
tasks.spec: Joins GOOGLE_CREDS_SA_PRIVATE_KEY_PT_1 + _PT_2, builds JWT (RS256 via crypto.subtle), exchanges at https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token. Caches access token in KV keyed by sa-client-email hash, TTL = expires_in - 60s. getServiceAccountAccessToken(env, scopes: string[]): Promise<string>

tasks.title: Google Docs/Drive tool
tasks.spec: GoogleDocsClient class methods: createFromTemplate(templateId, replacements, parentFolderId), read(docId), appendText(docId, text), addComment(docId, anchor, text), replyToComment(docId, commentId, text), listComments(docId, filter?). All call Drive v3 + Docs v1 REST APIs via fetch.

tasks.title: NotebookLM tool
tasks.spec: Imports notebooklm-sdk (agmmnn). Mints user-OAuth access token from refresh-token grant (NOTEBOOKLM_OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN/_CLIENT_ID/_CLIENT_SECRET) — cache in KV. consultNotebook(env, query): reads agent_rules from global_config and prepends as guardrail; calls SDK with NOTEBOOKLM_NOTEBOOK_ID. Smoke-test in wrangler dev to confirm isolate compatibility.

tasks.title: OrchestratorAgent Durable Object
tasks.spec: extends Agent<Env, OrchestratorState>. State: { roleId, pendingTasks }. Tools registered: scrape_job, extract_job_details, consult_notebook, create_doc_from_template, read_doc, write_doc, comment_on_doc, reply_to_thread, list_doc_comments_tagged, list_roles, update_role, draft_email_reply. 30s alarm orchestration loop. WebSocket streaming back to UI via SDK.

tasks.title: Hono app shell
tasks.spec: OpenAPIHono<{Bindings:Env, Variables:{authed:true}}>. Mounts errorMiddleware + authMiddleware + 8 routers. doc('/openapi.json'). apiReference for /scalar. swaggerUI for /swagger. /docs redirects /scalar.

tasks.title: Roles CRUD route
tasks.spec: GET /api/roles (list, sort, filter), GET /:id, POST (createRoute with insertRoleSchema), PATCH /:id, DELETE /:id.

tasks.title: Intake route (SSE)
tasks.spec: POST /api/intake/scrape → SSE stream emitting {stage:'scraping'|'extracting'|'mapping', payload}. Calls scrapeUrl → tasks/extract with JobPosting zod schema. POST /api/intake/confirm → persist role, create Drive folder via google-docs tool, dispatch Colby job_extract task.

tasks.title: Threads + messages route
tasks.spec: GET /api/threads/:roleId, POST /:roleId/messages (proxies to OrchestratorAgent WebSocket via SDK).

tasks.title: Documents route
tasks.spec: GET /api/documents (filter by roleId), POST (manual link to existing GDoc), DELETE /:id.

tasks.title: Emails route
tasks.spec: GET /api/emails (filter), GET /unmatched, POST /:id/associate { roleId }, GET /:id.

tasks.title: Config route
tasks.spec: GET /api/config, GET /:key, PUT /:key { value }. POST /api/admin/seed (idempotent — seeds default agent_rules, resume_bullets, template_ids).

tasks.title: Dashboard route
tasks.spec: GET /api/dashboard/summary (counts by status), /by-company (Recharts data), /by-salary, /preparing, /pending-tasks, /recent-emails.

tasks.title: Client error ingestion
tasks.spec: POST /api/__client-error → log with stack, url, userAgent. Auth required.

tasks.title: Email handler
tasks.spec: handleInboundEmail(message, env, ctx): parses with postal-mime, persists to emails table, runs match heuristic (keyword scan against active roles, scored), match → enqueue Colby email_draft task; no match → EMAIL_OUT.send templated reply with link to /email-associate/{id}.

tasks.title: Wire _worker.ts
tasks.spec: ExportedHandler with fetch (existing routing) + email (delegates to handleInboundEmail). Add `export { OrchestratorAgent } from './backend/ai/agents/orchestrator'`. Update fetch to also handle /api/__client-error.

tasks.title: API client
tasks.spec: Typed fetch wrapper. credentials: 'include'. Surfaces non-2xx as toast errors. Single source for all client → /api/* calls.

tasks.title: Navbar.astro
tasks.spec: Top nav with links: Dashboard / Roles / Config / Docs / OpenAPI / Scalar / Swagger. Mobile-responsive hamburger. shadcn dark.

tasks.title: Sidebar.tsx (collapsible)
tasks.spec: Collapsible sidebar (mobile drawer). Links keyed off active route. shadcn primitives.

tasks.title: ErrorLogger.tsx
tasks.spec: React island. Wraps window.onerror + window.onunhandledrejection. POSTs to /api/__client-error. Renders shadcn Toaster for runtime errors.

tasks.title: BaseLayout.astro update
tasks.spec: Always renders <Navbar /> + <ErrorLogger client:load />. Default dark mode. Loads shadcn Toaster.

tasks.title: Login page
tasks.spec: Single-input form for API key. Posts to /api/auth/login. SSR check: if cookie valid, redirect /.

tasks.title: Dashboard stat cards
tasks.spec: 4 cards: Total / Preparing / Applied / Interviewing. Real data from /api/dashboard/summary.

tasks.title: Jobs-by-company bar chart
tasks.spec: Recharts BarChart from /api/dashboard/by-company.

tasks.title: Salary-range line chart
tasks.spec: Recharts LineChart from /api/dashboard/by-salary.

tasks.title: Dashboard widgets (PreparingList, PendingTasks, RecentEmails)
tasks.spec: Three list widgets wired to /api/dashboard endpoints.

tasks.title: Dashboard page
tasks.spec: SSR cookie check. Composes all dashboard components. + 'New Role' button triggering IntakeModal.

tasks.title: IntakeProgress component
tasks.spec: Checklist UI: Scraping ✓ / Extracting ✓ / Mapping ✓. Receives stage updates.

tasks.title: IntakeModal component
tasks.spec: shadcn Dialog. 3-step wizard: URL input → SSE consumer of /api/intake/scrape → prefilled form → POST /api/intake/confirm. NEVER window.prompt.

tasks.title: Roles list page
tasks.spec: shadcn Table with sort + filter (status chips). Rows link to /roles/[id].

tasks.title: Role components (Header, Config, ThreadSidebar, DocumentsList)
tasks.spec: RoleHeader: company/title/status/salary. RoleConfig: edit role_instructions override. ThreadSidebar: assistant-ui chat bound to ORCHESTRATOR_AGENT via Agents SDK WebSocket. DocumentsList: lists documents rows with open-in-Drive.

tasks.title: Role viewport page
tasks.spec: Tabs: Overview | Documents | Threads | Config | Emails. Sidebar always visible (chat). SSR fetches role record.

tasks.title: Config editor components
tasks.spec: Three card editors. Drag-to-reorder for arrays. Persist via PUT /api/config/:key.

tasks.title: Config page
tasks.spec: Composes the three editors. SSR cookie check.

tasks.title: Email association page
tasks.spec: Shows email summary. Lists active roles as cards. One-click 'Associate' → POST /api/emails/:id/associate.

tasks.title: Internal docs route
tasks.spec: Renders markdown docs from src/frontend/content/docs/* (placeholder content acceptable initially).

tasks.title: .agent/rules/ai-wrapper.md
tasks.spec: All AI must go through src/backend/ai/tasks/. Direct env.AI calls in agent/tool/route code fail review. Adding a model = one file in models/ + one entry in registry.

tasks.title: .agent/rules/sdk-choice.md
tasks.spec: NotebookLM must use notebooklm-sdk (agmmnn) — not the official one. Verify isolate compatibility on first install.

tasks.title: .agent/rules/google-auth.md
tasks.spec: All Workspace API calls use Service Account + DWD via src/backend/lib/google-auth.ts. Refresh tokens cached in KV with TTL = expires_in - 60s.

tasks.title: .agent/workflows/implement-feature.md
tasks.spec: Order: D1 schema → AI provider/model/tasks → Tools → Agent → Hono routes → Frontend. Stitch mockups before frontend per cloudflare-jedi.

tasks.title: /AGENTS.md project briefing
tasks.spec: Briefing for Jules sessions. Project goal, architecture summary, golden rules, modularization principles, link to PRD.

tasks.title: Type check + lint
acceptance: Zero type errors. Zero lint violations. AI-import lint rule enforced.

tasks.title: Local D1 verification
actions: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "select name from sqlite_master where type='table'"
acceptance: 6 tables present: roles, documents, threads, messages, emails, global_config

tasks.title: Local smoke test
actions: Visit /scalar and /swagger — confirm dynamic OpenAPI spec
Trigger IntakeModal with a real LinkedIn URL → SSE checklist completes → row persists
acceptance: All steps pass. AI Gateway dashboard shows requests with model labels.

tasks.title: Email handler smoke test
actions: Forward a test email matching an active role's company name
acceptance: Match: emails row created with status=associated, messages row appended to thread, Colby task enqueued
No match: emails row created with status=unmatched, auto-reply received with link to /email-associate/{id}

tasks.title: Production deploy
actions: Confirm the 5 new secrets are populated via wrangler secrets-store
acceptance: Cookie auth works against deployed worker
